posts.author: robvhees (Rob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maybe someone can give a good tip.

I have one mail board with all my projects, I use this this for my budget.
I get the overview from the board via dasboard and widget.

When the status in the main board changed, another board is created for the project through automation.

Now I want that when I’m done with this board give an action back to the main board, is this possible and how?

So what I mean when you have done all the tasks of this board, can you give a message back to the main board and to the item?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @robvhees - there are limited actions that you can do natively right now.

Can you expand on the action that you want? Are you looking to update a status? Perhaps you are interested in creating your own automation using our API: Creating your own automations
